name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's powerful conversational AI for writing, coding, analysis, and more.
longDescription: ChatGPT by OpenAI is one of the most versatile AI assistants available today. It can help with a vast range of tasks including creative writing, code generation, data analysis, math problem solving, language translation, and general question answering. With GPT-4o, users get multimodal capabilities including image understanding. ChatGPT Plus and Team plans unlock advanced features, longer context, and plugin access.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's safety-focused AI assistant with exceptional reasoning and long context.
longDescription: Claude by Anthropic is a highly capable AI assistant known for its safety, honesty, and helpfulness. Claude excels at nuanced writing, complex analysis, and long-document summarization with its 200K token context window. Claude 3.5 Sonnet offers state-of-the-art performance for coding and reasoning tasks while maintaining Anthropic's constitutional AI principles. It's trusted by enterprises for sensitive workflows.
bestFor: Professionals needing deep analysis and long-form reasoning

name: Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI model with deep Google ecosystem integration.
longDescription: Gemini by Google is a state-of-the-art multimodal AI model that seamlessly integrates with Google's ecosystem including Docs, Sheets, Gmail, and more. Gemini 1.5 Pro features a massive 1M token context window, enabling analysis of entire codebases, books, or hours of audio. With Google's vast knowledge graph and real-time search integration, Gemini excels at up-to-date research and factual questions.

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and productivity assistant built directly into Notion workspace.
longDescription: Notion AI supercharges your Notion workspace with intelligent writing, editing, and summarization capabilities. It can generate content, fix grammar, translate text, create action items from meeting notes, and summarize long documents — all without leaving your workspace. Notion AI understands the context of your workspace, making it ideal for teams that already use Notion for project management and documentation.
bestFor: Teams using Notion for project management

name: Jasper AI
description: Enterprise-grade AI writing platform for marketing teams and content creators.
longDescription: Jasper is an enterprise-focused AI writing assistant designed specifically for marketing teams. It features brand voice settings, campaign templates, and integrations with popular marketing tools. Jasper's Boss Mode allows long-form content generation with SEO optimization built in. With team collaboration features and a vast template library, Jasper streamlines content production workflows for agencies and marketing departments.

name: Grammarly
description: AI-powered writing assistant for grammar, clarity, and tone improvement.
longDescription: Grammarly is the world's leading AI writing assistant, helping over 30 million users write clearly and effectively. Beyond simple grammar checking, Grammarly's AI suggests style improvements, checks tone appropriateness, detects plagiarism, and offers full-sentence rewrites. GrammarlyGO adds generative AI capabilities for drafting emails, messages, and documents. It works across browsers, Microsoft Office, Google Docs, and desktop apps.

name: Midjourney
description: Industry-leading AI image generation with stunning artistic quality via Discord.
longDescription: Midjourney is one of the most popular and highest-quality AI image generation tools available. Known for its exceptionally aesthetic outputs and artistic style, Midjourney v6 produces photorealistic images, illustrations, and concept art at professional quality. Operating primarily through Discord, it has a unique community-driven experience. The new web interface makes it more accessible. Midjourney excels at artistic and creative image generation tasks.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's advanced text-to-image model with precise prompt adherence via ChatGPT.
longDescription: DALL-E 3 by OpenAI represents a significant leap in text-to-image generation, featuring dramatically improved prompt adherence and text rendering within images. Integrated directly into ChatGPT Plus, DALL-E 3 allows natural language refinement of images through conversation. It produces high-quality, diverse images across photorealistic, illustrated, and abstract styles, with built-in safety features preventing harmful content generation.
bestFor: ChatGPT Plus users needing precise image generation

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source AI image generation model you can run locally or via API.
longDescription: Stable Diffusion by Stability AI is the most popular open-source text-to-image model, giving developers and creators complete control over image generation. Run it locally on your own hardware for unlimited free generations, or use cloud APIs for convenience. The vast ecosystem of fine-tuned models, LoRAs, and extensions (especially via AUTOMATIC1111 or ComfyUI) makes it infinitely customizable. Perfect for developers and power users.
bestFor: Developers and power users wanting full control

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe's AI image generator trained on licensed content, safe for commercial use.
longDescription: Adobe Firefly is Adobe's suite of AI-powered creative tools embedded throughout the Creative Cloud ecosystem. Unlike other AI image generators, Firefly is trained exclusively on licensed content, making it safe for commercial use. Features include generative fill in Photoshop, text-to-image, text-to-vector, and generative recolor. The deep integration with Photoshop, Illustrator, and Express makes it the go-to choice for professional designers.
bestFor: Professional designers using Adobe Creative Cloud

name: ElevenLabs
description: Ultra-realistic AI voice generation and cloning for podcasts, videos, and apps.
longDescription: ElevenLabs is the industry leader in AI voice synthesis, offering stunningly realistic voice generation and cloning capabilities. With just a few seconds of audio, ElevenLabs can clone any voice and generate speech in that voice across multiple languages. The platform supports 29+ languages, real-time voice conversion, and a massive library of pre-made AI voices. Widely used for audiobooks, podcasts, YouTube videos, and accessibility applications.
bestFor: Content creators and developers building voice apps

name: Murf AI
description: Studio-quality AI voiceover generation for presentations, videos, and e-learning.
longDescription: Murf AI is a professional voiceover platform that transforms text into studio-quality speech using AI. It features over 120 AI voices across 20+ languages, with fine-grained control over pitch, speed, and emphasis. The built-in video editor lets you sync voiceovers with visuals directly in the browser. Murf is particularly popular for e-learning content, explainer videos, and corporate presentations where professional narration is needed.
bestFor: Corporate trainers, marketers, and video creators

name: Descript
description: AI-powered podcast and video editor that lets you edit media by editing text.
longDescription: Descript revolutionizes audio and video editing with its text-based editing approach — edit your transcript to edit your media. AI features include automatic transcription, filler word removal, Studio Sound noise cancellation, and Overdub voice cloning for seamless corrections. Green screen, eye contact correction, and collaborative editing make it a complete production suite. Ideal for podcasters and video creators who spend hours in traditional editing tools.

name: Runway
description: Professional AI video generation and editing suite with Gen-2 video model.
longDescription: Runway is a creative AI platform built for video professionals. Its Gen-2 model generates realistic video clips from text prompts or reference images. Additional tools include background removal, motion tracking, inpainting, and AI-powered color grading. Runway's suite of 30+ AI tools makes it the Swiss Army knife of AI video production. Used by major film studios and content creators for everything from music videos to film VFX.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's groundbreaking text-to-video model creating cinematic quality videos.
longDescription: Sora by OpenAI is a revolutionary text-to-video AI model capable of generating realistic and imaginative scenes from text descriptions. It can create videos up to a minute long while maintaining high visual quality and adherence to the prompt. Sora understands not just what a prompt says, but how these elements exist in the physical world, creating scenes with complex camera movements, physical interactions, and consistent characters across long clips.

name: Synthesia
description: Create professional AI avatar videos in 130+ languages without cameras.
longDescription: Synthesia enables anyone to create professional-quality videos featuring AI avatars without cameras, microphones, or studios. Simply type your script, choose from 140+ diverse AI avatars, and Synthesia generates a polished video in minutes. Supporting 130+ languages with native-quality lip sync, it's the ultimate solution for multilingual corporate training, product demos, and internal communications at scale.

name: HeyGen
description: AI video generation platform with realistic avatars and video translation.
longDescription: HeyGen is a powerful AI video platform specializing in realistic avatar-based videos and revolutionary video translation. Its video translation feature can dub any video into 40+ languages with perfect lip sync — a game-changer for global content creators. HeyGen also offers instant avatar creation from a selfie video, making personalized video communication at scale accessible for sales, marketing, and customer success teams.
bestFor: Sales teams and global content creators

name: Pika
description: AI video generation tool transforming ideas and images into cinematic videos.
longDescription: Pika is an innovative AI video generation platform that converts text prompts and images into stunning video clips. Pika 1.5 introduced Pikaffects — special effects like crushing, melting, exploding, and inflating objects within videos. Its user-friendly interface makes high-quality AI video generation accessible without technical expertise. Discord community and web app provide flexible access options for creators of all skill levels.

name: Luma AI
description: Photorealistic 3D capture and AI video generation for stunning visuals.
longDescription: Luma AI offers two revolutionary products: NeRF-based 3D scene capture from video, and Dream Machine — an advanced AI video generation model. Dream Machine creates high-quality, physically accurate videos from text and images with remarkable consistency. Luma's 3D capture tools let anyone create photorealistic 3D models using just a smartphone camera, useful for e-commerce, AR, and game development.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer by GitHub & OpenAI powering developers in VS Code and more.
longDescription: GitHub Copilot is the world's most widely adopted AI developer tool, used by over 1 million developers. Powered by OpenAI's Codex model, it provides real-time code suggestions, function completions, and entire code block generation within your IDE. Copilot Chat enables natural language conversations about your code, and Copilot Workspace automates multi-step coding tasks. Available across VS Code, JetBrains IDEs, and more.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built for pair programming with Claude and GPT-4 models.
longDescription: Cursor is an AI-native code editor forked from VS Code that deeply integrates AI into every aspect of the coding workflow. With Cmd+K inline editing, natural language code generation, codebase chat, and multi-file editing, Cursor feels like having an expert developer always available. Cursor can understand your entire codebase context and make large-scale refactors across multiple files simultaneously. Rapidly becoming the editor of choice for AI-native developers.

name: Tabnine
description: Privacy-first AI code completion supporting all major languages and IDEs.
longDescription: Tabnine is a privacy-focused AI code assistant that can be deployed entirely on-premise, making it ideal for enterprises with strict data security requirements. It supports 30+ programming languages and integrates with all major IDEs including VS Code, IntelliJ, PyCharm, and more. Tabnine learns from your team's coding patterns to provide personalized suggestions that align with your codebase style and conventions.
bestFor: Enterprise development teams with privacy requirements

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder — build complete web apps from prompts.
longDescription: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer) is a revolutionary AI software engineer that builds complete full-stack web applications from natural language descriptions. Describe what you want, and Lovable generates a complete React app with Supabase backend integration, deployed instantly to the web. With its visual editor and real-time collaboration features, it bridges the gap between idea and deployed product in minutes. Perfect for founders and product builders.

name: Bolt.new
description: StackBlitz's AI full-stack web app builder with real browser execution.
longDescription: Bolt.new by StackBlitz is a browser-based AI development environment that can install packages, run servers, and build complete full-stack applications — all in the browser using WebContainers technology. Unlike other AI builders, Bolt provides a full development environment where you can see, edit, and run your code in real-time. Supports React, Vue, Node.js, and many other frameworks with one-click Netlify deployment.
bestFor: Developers and founders wanting instant deployment

name: v0 by Vercel
description: Vercel's AI UI generator creating React + shadcn/ui components from descriptions.
longDescription: v0 by Vercel is an AI-powered UI generation tool that creates production-ready React components using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS from natural language descriptions. Simply describe the UI you want, and v0 generates clean, accessible, and customizable code that you can iterate on through conversation. The components are immediately deployable to Vercel and integrate seamlessly with Next.js projects. Ideal for rapidly building UI prototypes.

name: Canva AI
description: AI-powered design tools integrated into Canva for effortless graphic creation.
longDescription: Canva's suite of AI tools transforms the design experience for millions of users. Magic Studio includes Magic Design (auto-generate complete designs from a prompt), Magic Edit (AI-powered image editing), Magic Write (AI copywriting), and Background Remover. With over 100M templates and deep AI integration, Canva AI democratizes professional design for non-designers. The recent AI features make previously complex design tasks accessible in seconds.

name: Framer AI
description: AI-powered website builder creating beautiful, publishable sites from text prompts.
longDescription: Framer AI revolutionizes website creation by generating complete, production-ready websites from a single text prompt. The AI creates layouts, selects imagery, writes copy, and handles responsive design automatically. With Framer's visual editor, you can then refine every detail. The platform includes hosting, custom domains, SEO tools, and CMS capabilities. Framer AI is the fastest path from concept to published website for designers and marketers.
bestFor: Designers and marketers wanting fast, beautiful websites

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine providing cited, real-time answers to any question.
longDescription: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered answer engine that combines the breadth of web search with the intelligence of large language models. Unlike traditional search engines, Perplexity provides direct, synthesized answers with cited sources, enabling confident fact-checking. Pro Search performs deeper multi-step research, while Perplexity Pages allows publishing research as formatted documents. It's rapidly replacing Google for complex research questions among AI-savvy users.

name: Consensus
description: AI research tool that searches scientific papers and extracts evidence-based insights.
longDescription: Consensus is an AI-powered academic search engine that scours millions of peer-reviewed research papers to find evidence-based answers to your questions. Unlike general AI tools, Consensus specifically prioritizes scientific literature, providing consensus meters that show what percentage of studies agree with a claim. This makes it invaluable for healthcare professionals, researchers, and anyone needing evidence-based insights rather than AI-generated opinions.

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that automates literature reviews with systematic extraction.
longDescription: Elicit is an AI research assistant specifically designed for systematic literature reviews and scientific research. It can automatically find, filter, and extract data from hundreds of research papers simultaneously, presenting findings in a structured table for analysis. Elicit uses language models to understand scientific concepts and identify relevant papers across disciplines. It saves researchers weeks of manual literature review work by automating the most time-consuming parts of the process.

name: You.com
description: Customizable AI search engine with apps and real-time web access for any task.
longDescription: You.com is a personalized AI search and assistant platform that combines real-time web search with powerful AI capabilities. YouChat provides conversational AI with web access, while specialized modes for coding, writing, and research adapt the AI to specific tasks. The platform's unique App marketplace lets users customize their AI experience with specialized tools. You.com's commitment to privacy — not selling user data — differentiates it from mainstream search engines.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI-powered copywriting tool for marketing copy, emails, and social content at scale.
longDescription: Copy.ai is a leading AI copywriting platform with a focus on go-to-market content creation. Its GTM AI Platform helps sales and marketing teams automate repetitive content tasks including cold emails, product descriptions, social media posts, and ad copy. With over 90 templates and workflow automation features, Copy.ai enables teams to produce months of content in hours. The platform integrates with CRMs and marketing tools for seamless workflows.

name: Zapier AI
description: No-code AI automation platform connecting 6000+ apps with intelligent workflows.
longDescription: Zapier AI extends the world's leading automation platform with AI capabilities, enabling anyone to create intelligent workflows without code. AI-powered Zaps can parse emails, extract data from documents, generate content, and make decisions autonomously. The new AI Actions feature exposes Zapier's 6000+ app integrations directly to AI models like ChatGPT, enabling AI to take real-world actions. Canvas provides visual AI workflow design for complex business automation.

name: Gamma
description: AI presentation maker creating stunning slides and docs from a simple prompt.
longDescription: Gamma is an AI-powered presentation and document tool that creates beautiful, interactive presentations from a text prompt in under a minute. Unlike traditional slide tools, Gamma supports rich media embedding, analytics, one-click publishing to the web, and collaborative editing. Its AI can transform any document or PDF into a polished presentation, making it ideal for pitches, reports, and educational content. The visual flexibility beats PowerPoint without requiring design skills.

name: Beautiful.ai
description: Smart AI presentation software that auto-designs slides as you add content.
longDescription: Beautiful.ai is a smart presentation tool that uses AI to automatically design stunning slides as you add content. Unlike traditional tools where you manually arrange everything, Beautiful.ai's DesignerBot AI generates complete slide decks from a topic prompt and Smart Slides auto-layout your content beautifully. With 60+ smart slide templates, brand controls, and real-time collaboration, it's the most design-intelligent presentation tool for business teams.

name: Tome
description: AI storytelling and presentation tool for compelling narratives and pitches.
longDescription: Tome is an AI-native presentation and storytelling tool designed to make compelling narratives. Using AI, Tome can generate complete presentations with coherent storylines, relevant imagery, and data visualization from a simple prompt. Its unique tile-based format and AI companion help users structure information more effectively than traditional slides. Tome is particularly popular for startup pitches, sales narratives, and creative storytelling where narrative flow matters as much as design.

name: Wordtune
description: AI writing companion that rephrases, shortens, and improves your writing style.
longDescription: Wordtune is an AI-powered writing assistant that goes beyond grammar checking to actually rewrite and improve your text while preserving your original meaning. It offers multiple rewriting options including formal/casual tone adjustments, text shortening, text expansion, and complete sentence rewrites. The Spices feature adds relevant facts, statistics, and examples to strengthen arguments. Available as a browser extension, Wordtune works across Gmail, Google Docs, LinkedIn, and more.
bestFor: Professionals and students improving their writing

name: Make
description: Visual AI automation platform with 1500+ app integrations and complex workflows.
longDescription: Make (formerly Integromat) is a powerful visual automation platform that allows users to design and automate complex workflows through a drag-and-drop interface. With 1500+ app integrations and advanced AI modules, Make handles sophisticated data transformations and multi-step processes that simpler tools cannot. Make's AI capabilities include content generation, data classification, and intelligent routing. Enterprise-grade reliability and custom function support make it the choice for technical teams.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation tool with AI nodes and self-hosting capability.
longDescription: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that gives developers and technical teams full control over their automation infrastructure. With built-in AI capabilities including LLM nodes, document processing, and vector store integration, n8n enables building sophisticated AI-powered workflows. The self-hosted option ensures complete data privacy and eliminates per-task pricing. With 400+ integrations and JavaScript custom functions, n8n handles automation complexity that cloud-only tools cannot.

name: Kling AI
description: Kuaishou's next-gen video generation AI with advanced motion and physics simulation.
longDescription: Kling AI by Kuaishou is a state-of-the-art video generation model that produces high-fidelity, physically accurate video clips from text and image inputs. With its advanced 3D spatiotemporal joint attention mechanism, Kling creates videos with consistent motion dynamics and realistic physics. Key capabilities include generating 2-minute videos at up to 1080p resolution, camera control, and facial expression transfer. Kling has quickly become a top competitor in the AI video generation space.
